# CWE-820: Missing Synchronization (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-820-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var visitMu sync.Mutex
var visitCounts = map[string]int{}

// Safe: mutex protects concurrent updates to the shared counter map.
func TrackVisit(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	key := r.RemoteAddr
	visitMu.Lock()
	visitCounts[key] = visitCounts[key] + 1
	count := visitCounts[key]
	visitMu.Unlock()
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]int{"visits": count})
}
